feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Change On The Rise
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,064Chapters: 74/75Kudos: 86

Summary: (Teen Wolf/Stargate Crossover AU continuation)As summer draws to a close, the Littlefield pack continues their long road to recovery. Still reeling from his sister's death and resurrection, Derek returns to his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor; Cora grapples with the consequences of everything that transpired over the summer, including her return from the dead; and Stiles finds new ways to balance the desires of his inner demons with the needs of his pack.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Divine Move
entry.summary:
Author: FailCat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,843Chapters: 11/17Kudos: 664

Summary: Stiles is dealing with trauma of the Nogitsune but is afraid that the pack won’t accept him after murdering twenty-one people while possessed by the Nogitsune. Derek changes tactics and tries to run the pack how his mother would, while also trying to get stiles to stop his self isolation from the pack.

entry.title: All Alphas Are Bastards (AAAB)
entry.summary:
Author: diecide

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,889Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 62

Summary: After Stiles gets kicked out of Kansas High School, the sheriff is forced to find a new job in Beacon Hills, California. What happens when the notorious troublemaker meets the beacon for monsters? Add in hot werewolves and family secrets, Stiles is positive the sheriff is going to disown him.

entry.title: fake smile
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,027Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Derek’s barely spoken a word all evening, has no clue what to say or how to start his own conversation with anyone. All his friends are on the other end of the table, and the people sitting right around him are Stiles’ coworkers, or friends of friends. The only one other than Stiles that he’s interested in interacting with is the golden retriever he spots out the window. “Please, please can we leave,” he types slowly, glowering at autocorrect and his own clumsy typing. “Also maybe a Taco Bell run on the way home, they have a new menu,” he adds. Fuck it; if he’s asking to leave early, there’d better be something in it for both of them. -Or, Derek is stuck at a dinner party with Stiles, everything is awkward, and he just wants to go home.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

  • Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Bad Moon Rising
entry.summary:
Author: volchitsa70

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,904Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 69

Summary: The BAU are 99% sure that Peter Hale is the unsub they've been looking for. The only fly in the ointment is that his girlfriend(?) Lydia Martin, is an FBI agent and the newest member of the team.

entry.title: [Podfic] Doodles by Definitively_Different_Drivel
entry.summary:
Author: Squishyowlbear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Summary:Screaming fabric stretched across Derek's skin. Damn though, those were pecs of truth, pinched and perky and perfectly poised beneath altogether too thin fabric. He'd need to take it up with Shakira, because yeah her hips didn't lie but clearly they weren't bastions of veracity like Derek's chest, and— shit. Derek's eyebrows grew stormier, like a pair of little thunderclouds, ready to rain on Stiles' tight-shirt parade, only without water, because life wasn't fair, demonstrated by the fact that his thoughts were now occupied by visions of Derek's t-shirt, soaked, wet, and wrapped like latex as the sight of tan skin seeped through and— Shit. What was he thinking about again? "You remember what happened last time you got me into a shirt this tight, don't you?" In which Stiles shrinks Derek's clothes and gets caught. Derek gets some very creative revenge. It ends, of course, in smut.

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,222Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 41

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,807Chapters: 39/42Kudos: 129

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: The Mage's Home
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,433Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 64

Summary: After a severe crash out and mental breakdown that resulted in him opening his soul and awakening it to his true power, Stiles is kicked out of Scott's pack by said Alpha. Years later, a much more mature and powerful Stiles receives an S.O.S message from a friend, and this time, he won't fail. Or; Stiles leaves Beacon Hills, makes his own pack, gets better, and returns to kick ass.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 116,366Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 17

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: I surrender who I've been for who you are
entry.summary:
Author: ichengxhun

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,954Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 51

Summary: When Sitles is born, he has a unique and distinctive mark just below his neck. In a society where the supernatural and magic are as ordinary as breathing, the concept of soulmates should be considered just as common; the thing is, it isn’t. Soulmates are reserved for outstanding and important figures in the world—for people with so much power in the palms of their hands that someone must exist to balance and share the burden of destiny.

entry.title: Beneath an Orange Sky
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,301Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 28

Summary: Companion pieces for Parasites Part 5 and Part 6 Sheriff Stilinski learns to open his heart to new love and expand his definition of family; Chris Argent transforms his life in all the most fundamental ways imaginable; Daniel Jackson discovers he's not as alone in the universe as he always thought; and Teal'c adapts to the shift from mentor to pack, and from friend to family.

entry.title: The Ties That Bind
entry.summary:
Author: Rnl1993

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,607Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 41

Summary: Dean and Sam grew up stopping by the Stilinski's house throughout the years. When Stiles ends up in the hospital due to a supernatural accident, Papa Stilinski decides to send Stiles with Dean for the summer to get properly trained. After all, he knows Stiles won't stop helping his friends and the best way to prepare him is to be trained by someone whose life is dedicated to dealing with the supernatural.ORThe one where the Winchesters grow up in a drastically different way and are pretty much adopted by the Stilinski's. The Hale's get a happy life rewrite and everything canon is pretty much changed to suit my needs. Originally called 'Echoes in our Lives'

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,626Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 44

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.
